name: io.github.ptrinh/freeport-nostr
description: Self-hosted Freeport: web app + read-only MCP (search rides/services/reputation by kind, tag & geohash radius) + push notifier + relay.

environmentVariables.name: FREEPORT_RELAYS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated relay websocket URLs. Defaults to the Freeport public relay set.
